items.name_en: A highly anticipated BV Bottega Veneta lunch box bag🔥. The entire body is crafted from top-tier nappa lambskin, very soft and lightweight. It also features the intrecciato weaving technique, developed by the two founders over several months since the brand's inception. Completely hand-woven by Italian artisans, perfectly embodying Bottega's artisanal spirit. The bag shape is practical and popular, and the slightly curved opening fits the wrist better. Model: 754443. Dimensions: 22*13*9

items.name_en: Authentic Grade
items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
The small lucky bag has become a fashion staple for girls in recent years. Its elegant and simple style has won the love of people of all ages. The interior is made of tech nylon, which is lightweight and easy to clean. Even when carrying many items, it helps reduce the burden. The strap features a knot design, allowing for easy adjustment. It can be used as a handbag; after tightening the drawstring, it looks like a cloud bag, making it perfect for summer outfits. Dimensions: 21*16.6*1CM3005s

It can be used as a handbag; after tightening the drawstring, it looks like a cloud bag, making it perfect for summer outfits. Dimensions: 21*16.6*1CM3005s
